learning_outcomes.description: Communicate in written Japanese on course-related topics, using appropriate patterns, vocabulary, script, and culturally appropriate expressions.
Use patterns, script, and vocabulary taught in the course to communicate on new topics and ideas.
Use strategies for managing comprehension and communication challenges.
Use a range of independent strategies to support ongoing Japanese language learning.

assessments.task_description:
The weekly in-class tasks are based on the content covered in classes and in the textbook. The tasks will be completed each week in the Workshop sessions. There is a total of 10 tasks. The minimum submission is 7 tasks.

Submission is in the Workshop weekly class. Access and submission is conducted via Blackboard link.

AI and MT STATEMENT

Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Translation (MT) are emerging tools that may support students in completing this assessment task. Students may appropriately use AI and/or MT in completing this assessment task. Students must clearly reference any use of AI or MT in each instance. A failure to reference generative AI or MT use may constitute student misconduct under the Student Code of Conduct.
assessments.submission_guidelines: Completed and submitted online during class time.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.task_description:
Students will be provided with a handwriting task based on the theme being studied in class to be completed and submitted in class.

Refer to the rubric in Blackboard Ultra for details.
assessments.submission_guidelines: Students are required to complete and submit in the Tutorial class. In the case of an extension the student must liaise with the course coordinator for a date and time to complete the assessment task.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.task_description:
The Student Portfolio consists of corrected handwriting tasks submitted during the semester and reflection. This task will be submitted in the tutorial class.

Refer to the rubric in Blackboard Ultra for details.
